title: One Shoe Shot, A Whole Campaign
meta: Vertical 9:16 reel, ~50s. Featured brand: Allbirds (real D2C footwear). Inspired by the @photoroom reel. Audio-only style: no spoken voice-over, the on-screen text carries it.
concept: The inspiration is a no-voiceover product reel: text over music shows AI product imagery everywhere, then a tool, then the without-the-studio-bills payoff. For Allbirds, Masonry turns one shoe shot into a full campaign, billboards, product video, lifestyle scenes, all on brand, without the studio bills. Same beat structure and length, fully original copy.
audio: Upbeat trending product-reel track with a clear pulse. This reel is AUDIO-ONLY by design: there is no spoken voice-over. The on-screen text plus the track and the visuals carry the whole message; cut every beat on the beat of the track.

beats.visual: A busy city street, a giant billboard overhead showing a clean Allbirds sneaker ad. Confident, aspirational open.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration 0 to 1s, the every-entrepreneur billboard hook.

beats.visual: Tilt up a building wall fully wrapped in an Allbirds Wool Runner campaign.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration 2 to 3s, the product everywhere beat.

beats.visual: A phone in a cafe scrolls to the same Allbirds ad running as a story.
A subway car interior with an Allbirds poster above the seats, commuters nearby.
A founder reads a Founders newspaper at a desk, implying the old, expensive production route.
A hand lifts a phone, the Masonry app opening on screen.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration 12 to 13s, the turn toward the tool.

beats.visual: Masonry interface, an Allbirds shoe loaded, the generate control in view.
A single ordinary Allbirds product photo is dragged into Masonry.
The shoe rotates in a lit studio scene, generated, scroll-stopping motion.
The sneaker on a sunlit sidewalk, a model mid-stride just behind it.
Macro on the shoe stitching and wool texture, crisp and true.
beats.mirrors: Inspiration 25 to 27s, the any-product detail beat.

beats.visual: Three Allbirds colorways line up in matching studio light.
A short prompt typed in Masonry: morning run, golden light, wet pavement.
The result reveals with the Allbirds palette and logo already intact.
Variation thumbnails flick past, the same shoe in different moods and scenes.
A clean grid of finished Allbirds ads assembles into place.
The full set laid out together: billboard, video frame, story, banner.
The Masonry app on a phone held up against the city, mirroring the source CTA.
End card: Allbirds wordmark with a small made-with-Masonry credit.

notes: Demo brand is Allbirds, a realistic stand-in for a D2C footwear or ecommerce client (swap in the actual client when producing). This is the no-voiceover case: leave Voice-over blank and let on-screen text plus the track carry it. All product, lifestyle and UI footage would be generated or assembled with Masonry; no media has been generated yet (generation is gated on separate approval). The source CTA pointed to Photoroom; the integration here is Masonry. Keep total runtime near 50s to match the reference.
